---
name: Bug Report
description: Report a bug or issue with the NLZiet Kodi addon
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
Describe what actually happened instead.

---

## System Information
- **Kodi Version:** (e.g., 21.0, 20.5)
- **Kodi OS:** (e.g., LibreELEC, Windows, Linux, macOS, Android)
- **Addon Version:** (e.g., 0.0.9)
- **NLZiet Subscription:** (Standard, Plus, etc.)

## Add-on Dependencies
- **inputstream.adaptive:** Version? Enabled?
- **inputstream.helper:** Version? Installed?
- **Other relevant add-ons:** List any others you think are related

---

## Debug Log
**Important:** Debug logs are REQUIRED for troubleshooting. Please:
1. Enable debug logging in NLZiet settings
2. Reproduce the bug
3. Upload your log to [https://paste.kodi.tv/](https://paste.kodi.tv/)
4. Paste the link below

**Log URL:** 

Or if you prefer, paste the relevant log excerpt (use code blocks):
```
Your debug log here
```

---

## Screenshots/Video
If applicable, add screenshots or a short video of the issue.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (network conditions, recent changes, etc.)

---

**Checklist:**
- [ ] I have the latest version of the addon installed (v0.0.9)
- [ ] I have enabled debug logging in addon settings
- [ ] I have included a debug log or paste.kodi.tv link
- [ ] I have provided system and Kodi version information
- [ ] I have cleared addon cache and data before testing
